title: hypericum reductum
intro: Hypericum reductum, also known as dwarf St. John's Wort, is a flowering perennial plant that belongs to the St. John's Wort family and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing anxiety and depression, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Hypericum reductum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
